subject: Re:
body:
Fun (transient) with Trump-China:

"What China Thinks of President-Elect Trump" broadcast on CCTV News, discussion with former Chinese ambassador to U.S. and head of Chinese Association of American studies - streamed - http://english.cntv.cn/2016/11/13/VIDEytqd1tlf30eFnd6vTIxy161113.shtml

Interview - http://www.atimes.com/article/china-wants-build-relations-dealmaker-trump/

More fun (enduring) with Closer To Truth; working new episodes from FQXi conference (e.g., "Physics of the Observer", "Physics of Consciousness", "Quantum Cosmology of the Beginning?", Philosophy of Cosmology"); progressing on "Sleep & Dreams".

In LA for 2 weeks, then back to China; NY in January. You there then?

Love to get your sense of Trump's administration, policies.

Robert
body_html:
Fun (transient) with Trump-China:

"What China Thinks of President-Elect Trump" broadcast on CCTV News, discussion with former Chinese ambassador to U.S. and head of Chinese Association of American studies - streamed - http://english.cntv.cn/2016/11/13/VIDEytqd1tlf30eFnd6vTIxy161113.shtml

Interview - http://www.atimes.com/article/china-wants-build-relations-dealmaker-trump/

More fun (enduring) with Closer To Truth; working new episodes from FQXi conference (e.g., "Physics of the Observer", "Physics of Consciousness", "Quantum Cosmology of the Beginning?", Philosophy of Cosmology"); progressing on "Sleep & Dreams".

In LA for 2 weeks, then back to China; NY in January. You there then?

Love to get your sense of Trump's administration, policies.

Robert

subject: Re:
body: for me it is tied to music. beethovens fifth, is 555-3. though unbeknownst to most people the first note (you can verify, bu looking at the score), is a rest note (silent) so 0-555-3

subject: Re:
body:
Didn't know. Meaning of the rest note?

Mahler's 5th opens with the same rhythmic motif (but 4th note is the same as the first three, not lower as in Beethoven's) - Mahler's 5th is my favorite symphony.
body_html:

subject: Re:
body:
Yes! You beat my family. (How'd you know?)

I celebrated in Beijing by (i) developing the Sleep/Dream proposal we discussed, (ii) lunch with an MNC CEO, and (iii) playing two hours of intense table tennis with a top coach.
